content:
# Session 74 (iter-074) — CSI route: backboneIncl_proj CLOSED & build-verified; last leaf scratch-validated

## Metadata
- CSI-route sorry: **2 → 1** (Leg file). Closed: `backboneIncl_proj`. Residual: `pushPull_interLegHom_sections` (Leg:1012).
- Other (non-active-lane) sorries unchanged: `CechHigherDirectImage.lean:780` (Route-A `cech_computes_higherDirectImage` assembly), `CechAugmentedResolution.lean:229` (Sub-brick A glue, import held back). Project term-sorry total = 3.
- Edits: 67 across Leg(114 events)/CSI(20)/Base(9). Builds run by prover: **0** (full-file `lake env lean` ≈ 27 min; prover used `/tmp/csileg_scratch{,2}.lean` against the real Base `.olean`).
- Session ended mid-merge ("IN PROGRESS" / "Session in progress") — prover killed before its own final verification, same as iter-073.

## VERIFICATION — the landing IS real (unlike iter-073)
- iter-073 landed 0 edits (prover correctly refused to land lake-unverified work). This iter landed 67 edits with 0 prover builds — but **`sync_leanok` (iter=74, sha dbaa628, 641 s) ran a dependency-aware `lake build` post-session and ADDED 19 `\leanok`, removed 0.** A build failure adds zero markers, so the build GREEN-ed → the `backboneIncl_proj` merge is kernel-verified, not merely LSP-clean. This satisfies the kernel-soundness-trap rule retroactively.
- The iter-073 recommendation (split the 2475-LOC CSI file) was EXECUTED: now 3 files — `CechSectionIdentification.lean` (1133), `CechSectionIdentificationBase.lean` (1486), `CechSectionIdentificationLeg.lean` (1305). The split is why inline scratch-validation became tractable and edits could land this iter.

## Target 1 — backboneIncl_proj (Leg:739) — SOLVED
- Prior session hit a 12.8M-heartbeat elaboration wall on the layer-peeling assembly. Fix = factor out the cost:
  - **(a)** one abstract combo lemma `ι_reindex_wpci_inv_overWPproj` (whiskerEquiv-reindex layer ∘ `ι_wpci_inv_overWPproj`), proved cheaply in the pre-extensive context;
  - **(b)** generic reassociation lemmas `entry_chain` / `glue_chain` proved in a clean abstract category context (rw/simp reliable there).
  - Concrete proof: `entry_chain ha2` → `rw [hexp]` (`cechBackbone_left_sigma.inv` unfolds to its 5 layers by rfl) → one `glue_chain` application → `exact habs`. No per-layer `congrArg`-prefix re-elaboration. `set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000`, `synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 400000`.
- Scratch-validated end-to-end (`scratch2`) against the real Base `.olean`, then merged; sync_leanok build confirms.

## Target 2 — pushPull_interLegHom_sections (Leg:1012) — PARTIAL (route fully scratch-validated, Step-4 merge pending)
- 5-step restrict-world decomposition; **Steps 0–3′ all COMPILE in scratch**, only Step-4 final assembly was still iterating at session end:
  - Step 0 `unit_pushforward_rFIP_inv`: `η^j ≫ j_*((rFIP j).inv.app N) = u_j.app N` (`rFIP = restrictFunctorIsoPullback = leftAdjointUniq (restrictAdjunction j)(pullbackPushforwardAdjunction j)`).
  - Step 1/K5 `restrict_unit_comp`, `inner_beta_chain`, Step 2/K4 `pullbackComp_rFIP_compat`, Step 3′ `pushPull_toRestrict_comm`, Step 4 `pls_eq`+`thin_resid5`+congrArg chain.
- Dead ends (reusable): `calc` fails `Trans Eq Eq ?m` synth on defeq-but-not-syntactic types (`(c≫q)_*` vs `q_*c_*`) — use explicit `Eq.trans`/`refine Eq.trans … ?_` (default-transparency unification). `simp only [Functor.map_comp]` does NOT fire on `(sectionFunctorV V).map (a ≫ b)` — `G.map` distributes over `≫` by defeq (`Hom.comp_app` rfl), so no distribution needed. `IsOpenImmersion` instance synth fails mid-application (use `@`-explicit). `rw [Scheme.homOfLE_ι]` on an image-typed (`''ᵁ`) goal FAILS motive-not-type-correct (the instance rides the open) — rewrite the preimage `⁻¹ᵁ` form (instance-free) via `simp only [← Scheme.homOfLE_ι X hle]`.

## Reviewer subagents (full reports in task_results/)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (csi)**: CLEAN — 5 decls, 0 red flags; file term-sorry-free.
- **lean-auditor (3 CSI files)**: 0 must-fix, 2 major, 5 minor. Majors: (1) `CechSectionIdentificationBase.lean:9–42` module docstring stale post-split (still lists `cechSection_complex_iso`/`cechSection_contractible`, now in `CechSectionIdentification.lean`); (2) 4 documented private-helper duplicates across the 3 files. Minors: Leg:15 header misnames the sorry location; orphaned scaffolding Leg:957–998; `maxHeartbeats 6400000` on Leg:1102/1137; inline status tracker Base:703; long inline planner-strategy comment blocks. → recommendations.md.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (leg)**: 1 **must-fix** — chapter is silent on how to prove `pushPull_interLegHom_sections` (no sketch, no `\lean{}` block); only a one-line mention inside `lem:coreIso_comm_leg`. NOTE: the 5-step route DOES exist — it is fully written in `task_results/…Leg.lean.md`; the gap is transcription into the blueprint. Also flags `coreIso_objIso_π`, `backboneIncl_proj`, `backboneIncl_nerveδ`, `interLegHom` as public lemmas with no blueprint blocks (coverage debt).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No `\mathlibok` candidates landed; no `\lean{}` renames flagged. The leg-checker's stale-`\leanok`-on-`lem:coreIso_comm` flag is NOT laundering: `coreIso_comm`'s own proof body is sorry-free and builds — its `\leanok` is `sync_leanok`'s correct per-block deterministic verdict (it does not trace transitive `sorryAx` taint through `pushPull_interLegHom_sections`). Left as-is per the "only override genuine laundering" rule; noted here for transparency. It will clear automatically once the last leaf closes.

## Coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **50** uncovered `lean_aux` decls (prover helpers from the split + `backboneIncl_proj` assembly + the push-pull decomposition). Full list in recommendations.md for the planner to blueprint.

## blueprint-doctor
- No structural findings (all chapters `\input`'d, all `\ref`/`\uses` resolve, no `axiom` decls).
